case_title: HUI LING WU VS. HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, HUI LING AS TO DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
